deny-docker.description: Blocks all Docker invocations, including the bare docker command.

deny-docker-run.description: Blocks creating and starting containers with docker run.

deny-docker-exec.description: Blocks running commands inside containers with docker exec.

deny-docker-rm.description: Blocks container removal with docker rm.

deny-docker-container-management.description: Blocks Docker container creation, in-container execution, and removal.

deny-docker-rmi.description: Blocks image removal with docker rmi.

deny-docker-system-prune.description: Blocks removal of unused Docker data with docker system prune.
deny-docker-system-prune.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'docker system prune' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-docker-volume-rm.description: Blocks volume removal with docker volume rm.
deny-docker-volume-rm.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'docker volume rm' -i "$CMD" -q

deny-docker-cleanup.description: Blocks Docker image, volume, and system cleanup operations.

deny-docker-compose-down.description: Blocks stopping and removing a Compose application with docker compose down.
deny-docker-compose-down.shell: CMD=$(printf '%s' "$PI_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); [ -z "$CMD" ] || bash-deny -r 'docker compose down' -i "$CMD" -q
